---
title: "People"
subtitle: "The researchers and students behind DEN Economics Lab"
toc: false
---

## Faculty & senior researchers

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[KG]{.person-avatar}

[Krisna Gupta]{.person-name}

[Lead researcher · DEN]{.person-role}

[Macroeconomics, trade policy, CGE. PhD in Economics.]{.person-bio}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[DR]{.person-avatar}

[Dinda Rachmania]{.person-name}

[Senior researcher]{.person-role}

[Climate economics, CGE modeling, distributional analysis.]{.person-bio}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[SA]{.person-avatar}

[Siti Aminah]{.person-name}

[Senior researcher]{.person-role}

[Public finance, fiscal decentralisation, quasi-experimental methods.]{.person-bio}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[BS]{.person-avatar}

[Budi Santoso]{.person-name}

[Affiliated researcher]{.person-role}

[Labour economics, education policy, panel data methods.]{.person-bio}
:::
:::

## Researchers & analysts

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[AP]{.person-avatar}

[Arya Pratama]{.person-name}

[Research economist]{.person-role}

[Gravity models, applied trade econometrics.]{.person-bio}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[YP]{.person-avatar}

[Yudo Prabowo]{.person-name}

[Research economist]{.person-role}

[Energy economics, sectoral modeling.]{.person-bio}
:::
:::

## Research assistants & students

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[RA]{.person-avatar}

[Research Assistant]{.person-name}

[Open position]{.person-role}

[We are recruiting. See the [contact section](#join-the-lab) below.]{.person-bio}
:::
:::

## Join the lab {#join-the-lab}

We periodically take on research assistants and visiting scholars. If you are
working on Indonesian macroeconomics, trade, or applied policy and would like
to collaborate, get in touch:

- General inquiries: <den.econ@dewanekonomi.go.id>
- Lead researcher: <krisna@dewanekonomi.go.id>
- GitHub: [github.com/den-econ](https://github.com/den-econ)
